title: Asserting internal signals does propagate - How can propagation be achived
body:
I'm am working on an emulator for a processor using verilator. 
I need to force some internal signals. In order to get access to internal signals from my verilator harness, I have given ventilator the --public argument. What i see in my VCD dumb is that only the signal that I directly force change value. This value is not propagated through the circuit. In the screenshot is an example - I have forced pcReg to 3FF..., which is directly connected to module output io_fedec_pc, which does not change its value.

Is there a special operation that I need to perform in order for forced internal signal values to propagate further? 

I appreciate the help - Thank you

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/19835481/79447235-d9660d80-7fdf-11ea-9b2a-d02d17b55d43.png)
